zh.lifeSummary: 當Hervey Walter於1130年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可韋斯特 德雷哈姆時，他的父親Hervey I de Clare30歲，母親Gilberta Godiva Le Becket20歲。他於大約1155年與Matilda De Valoignes在英國諾福爾可韋斯特 德雷哈姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1190年在他的家鄉享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hervey Walter于1130年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可韋斯特 德雷哈姆时，他的父亲Hervey I de Clare30岁，母亲Gilberta Godiva Le Becket20岁。他于大约1155年与Matilda De Valoignes在英国諾福爾可韋斯特 德雷哈姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1190年在他的家乡享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin), German, Dutch, Polish, Swedish, and Danish: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This personal name was introduced into England both in the reign of Edward the Confessor and by the Normans (in the forms Walt(i)er, Waut(i)er). After the Norman Conquest it soon became one of the most popular personal names in Britain. Compare Walther .
Germanized or Americanized form of Czech, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Valter and Czech Valtr: from the personal name Valter, Valtr, of ancient Germanic origin (see 1 above).

variants.name: Walthers
meanings: German: patronymic from the personal name Walther (see Walter ).

variants.name: McQuate
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Uait ‘son of Uat’, Gaelic form of the personal name Wat, a short form of Walter . Compare the Irish form McQuaid .

variants.name: Waltke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Jurgen, Wilhelmina.
German: from a pet form of any of the ancient Germanic personal names formed with Old High German waltan ‘to rule’ as the first element, as in Walter .

variants.name: McWaters
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Uaitéir, a patronymic from a Gaelicized form of the personal name Walter , with excrescent English -s.

variants.name: Wahler
meanings: German:
from the personal name Wol(d)er, Low German form of Walter .
habitational name for someone from any of various places called Wahl, Wahle, or Wahlen.

variants.name: McWalter
meanings: Irish and Scottish: from Gaelic Mac Uaitéir ‘son of Walter ’.

variants.name: Walters
meanings: English: variant of Walter , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
German: patronymic from   Walter  .

variants.name: McQuaid
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Colum, Nuala.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Uaid ‘son of Uad’, Gaelic form of the personal name Wat, a short form of Walter . Compare the Scottish form McQuate .

variants.name: Walther
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Erwin, Wolfgang, Otto, Gerhard, Gunter, Heinz, Klaus, Konrad, Bernd, Bernhard.
German, Dutch, Swedish, and Danish: variant of   Walter  .

variants.name: Lauter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Erwin, Kurt, Sigismund, Wolf.

German: topographic name and habitational name, from a common stream name meaning ‘clear’, from Middle High German hlutra, or from any of the places called Lauter or Lauta (Saxony). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and some other European countries.
Germanized or Americanized form of Slovenian Lavtar or its Croatized and rare Slovenian variant Lautar: from a dialect variant of the personal name Valter (see Walter ).

nameMeanings.name: Hervey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is derived from a Breton personal name composed of haer ‘battle’ + vy ‘worthy’. It was introduced to Britain by Bretons who settled in East Anglia and elsewhere in the wake of the Norman Conquest.

en.lifeSummary: When Hervey Walter was born in 1130, in West Dereham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hervey I de Clare, was 30 and his mother, Gilberta Godiva Le Becket, was 20. He married Matilda De Valoignes about 1155, in West Dereham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died in 1190, in his hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hervey Walter est né en 1130, à West Dereham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hervey I de Clare, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Gilberta Godiva Le Becket, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Matilda De Valoignes environ 1155, à West Dereham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé en 1190, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hervey Walter 1130 in West Dereham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hervey I de Clare 30 und seine Mutter Gilberta Godiva Le Becket 20. Er hat um 1155 in West Dereham, Norfolk, England Matilda De Valoignes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb 1190 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ja.lifeSummary: Hervey Walterが1130年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクウエスト デレハムで生まれた時，父Hervey I de Clareは30歳，母Gilberta Godiva Le Becketは20歳であった。約1155年にイギリスノーフォルクウエスト デレハムでMatilda De Valoignesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1190年に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hervey Walter(이)가 1130년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 웨스트 더함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hervey I de Clare(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Gilberta Godiva Le Becket(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1155년 영국 노르폴크 웨스트 더함에서 Matilda De Valoignes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1190년 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hervey Walter родился в 1130 г. в местности вест дирэам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hervey I de Clare было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Gilberta Godiva Le Becket, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda De Valoignes около 1155 г. в местности вест дирэам, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер в 1190 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.
